plugin_desc: FS.com 交换机专用 SNMP 采集（FS-PROCESS/MEMORY/SYSTEM-MIB，IANA 私有企业号 52642）。在标准 IF-MIB 接口指标之外，额外采集 FS 私有 OID 的完整设备健康集：CPU 利用率（fsNodeCPUTotal5min）、系统内存（容量/已用，KB）、机箱温度（fsSystemMultipleTemperatureCurrent）、风扇状态（fsSystemFanStatus）与电源状态（fsSystemElectricalInformationStatus）。风扇/电源原始码经 telegraf processors.enum 归一为 1=正常 / 2=异常；内存利用率按 已用/总量 计算。适用品牌型号——FS.com S 系列数据中心/园区交换机（如 S5810/S5800/N8560 系列）。
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: This metric reports the CPU utilization of the FS.com switch control plane (FS-PROCESS-MIB fsNodeCPUTotal5min, five-minute average), averaged across nodes and normalized to 0-100. Sustained high CPU usage can indicate control-plane overload, routing instability, or attack traffic, and may lead to slow management response or packet processing delays.

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: This metric reports the total size in bytes of the FS.com switch system memory pool (FS-MEMORY-MIB fsNodeMemoryPoolSize, reported in KB and scaled to bytes). Together with the used bytes it determines overall memory utilization.

metrics.name: device_memory_used
metrics.description: This metric reports the number of bytes currently in use by the FS.com switch system memory pool (FS-MEMORY-MIB fsNodeMemoryPoolUsed, reported in KB and scaled to bytes). It helps administrators understand absolute memory consumption and identify when the device is under memory pressure.

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: This metric reports overall memory utilization of the FS.com switch, computed as used / total * 100. High memory usage may indicate memory leaks, oversized routing/MAC/ARP tables, or insufficient capacity, and can cause instability or failed allocations.

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: This metric reports the chassis temperature in degrees Celsius of the FS.com switch (FS-SYSTEM-MIB fsSystemMultipleTemperatureCurrent, a dedicated typed temperature column), aggregated as the maximum across sensors. High temperatures can indicate cooling failure or airflow obstruction and risk thermal shutdown.

metrics.name: device_fan_state
metrics.description: This metric reports the fan state of the FS.com switch (FS-SYSTEM-MIB fsSystemFanStatus), normalized via telegraf processors.enum so that 1 = healthy (not-present / ready / normal) and 2 = fault (no-power / abnormal / unknown). Aggregated as the maximum across fans so any faulty fan surfaces. A value greater than 1 indicates a fan failure that can lead to overheating.

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: This metric reports the power-supply state of the FS.com switch (FS-SYSTEM-MIB fsSystemElectricalInformationStatus), normalized via telegraf processors.enum so that 1 = healthy (not-present / ready / normal) and 2 = fault (no-power / abnormal / unknown). Aggregated as the maximum across supplies so any failed PSU surfaces. A value greater than 1 indicates a power-supply problem.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifInOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifOutOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.
